The Pipeline · 5 Steps
Scout → Harvest → Analyse →
Detect → Strategise.
🔍 Niche Scout — finds your communities and samples YouTube 📦 Data Harvester — pulls Reddit posts, HN stories, YouTube stats 🔎 Pattern Analyst — finds what hooks, formats, and emotions win 🕳️ Gap Detector — Sentence-BERT semantic scoring + trend velocity 🚀 Strategy Agent — ranked 7-post calendar, ready to publish

Luna Intelligence Suite

Three tools.
One unfair edge.

Built on real ML — not just prompts. Luna surfaces what others miss.

Feature 01 · ML Powered
Semantic Gap Scoring
Uses Sentence-BERT to embed rising search queries and existing content — then measures semantic distance to output a numerical opportunity score. No other tool does this.
Sentence-BERT · Real ML
Feature 02 · Velocity
Trend Velocity Detection
Tracks niches across 7-day vs 30-day windows and calculates whether engagement is accelerating or decelerating. Know if you're early or late to the wave.
7d vs 30d · Time Windows
Feature 03 · Intelligence
Competitor Content Audit
Given a subreddit, find top creators by post frequency and score, analyze their patterns, and identify what they're NOT covering. Pure gap intelligence.
Reddit · Gap Intelligence
Questions · Answered

Everything you
need to know.

Luna is an AI content intelligence platform that watches Reddit, HackerNews, YouTube, and Google Trends simultaneously through five autonomous agents — identifying rising topics before they peak, and scoring content gaps so you always know what to create next.
Traditional tools give you search volume. Luna uses Sentence-BERT — a real machine learning model — to measure semantic distance between rising queries and existing content. The result is a numerical opportunity score showing exactly where demand is high and supply is low. No other consumer tool does this.
Luna tracks a niche across two windows — 7 days vs 30 days — and calculates whether engagement is accelerating or decelerating. This tells you whether you're early (ride the wave) or late (pivot now). Timing is everything, and now you'll always know where you stand.
Luna monitors four live data sources: Reddit (community-driven trends), HackerNews (tech and builder communities), YouTube (video search demand), and Google Trends (mass-market signals). Together they give you a complete view of what the internet is actually paying attention to.
Yes. The first 100 users get a permanent free pass — no credit card, no expiry. This is our founding cohort and they'll retain access even when Luna moves to a paid model. The only catch: spots are limited and going fast.
Luna is niche-agnostic. Whether you're in AI & Tech, personal finance, fitness, gaming, or any vertical — if people are talking about it online, Luna will find the rising signals. The Competitor Audit lets you input any specific subreddit to analyze your exact landscape.
The built-in calendar turns Luna's trend intelligence into a publishing schedule. Plan posts, videos, or threads directly inside Luna, assign them to dates, and track your full content pipeline — all in one place. No more juggling Notion, spreadsheets, and sticky notes.
